description: The CRM pipeline for the key account Horizon Technologies Ltd is disorganized and overdue for cleanup. Log into Odoo (admin@example.com / admin, database: odoo_demo). Clean up the Horizon Technologies Ltd pipeline by marking any opportunities in 'New' or 'Qualified' stages with no activity for over 30 days as Lost with the reason 'No Response / Stale Opportunity'. For the most recently active opportunity at this account, update the stage to 'Proposition', set the expected revenue to 65000, schedule a Phone Call activity titled 'Follow-up call - Horizon Technologies' due 7 days from today, and add an internal note with the text: 'Pipeline cleanup completed. Stale opportunities archived. Follow-up call scheduled.'
